revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月22日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1872年]][[1月2日]]） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]]を3府72県に再編
== 誕生日 == * [[仁治]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1242年]][[12月15日]]） - [[宗尊親王]]<ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}}</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1274年]]） * [[元治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1864年]][[12月20日]]） - [[竹内栖鳳]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1942年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘長]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1263年]][[12月24日]]） - [[北条時頼]]、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（* [[1227年]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>） * [[享保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1725年]][[1月6日]]） - [[近松門左衛門]]、[[浄瑠璃]]・[[歌舞伎]]狂言作家（* [[1653年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|21|11|23|10|22|12|11|1122}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

== できごと == * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1872年]][[1月2日]]） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]]を3府72県に再編
== 誕生日 == * [[仁治]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1242年]][[12月15日]]） - [[宗尊親王]]<ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}}</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1274年]]） * [[元治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1864年]][[12月20日]]） - [[竹内栖鳳]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1942年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘長]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1263年]][[12月24日]]） - [[北条時頼]]、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（* [[1227年]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>） * [[享保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1725年]][[1月6日]]） - [[近松門左衛門]]、[[浄瑠璃]]・[[歌舞伎]]狂言作家（* [[1653年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|21|11|23|10|22|12|11|1122}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

[[sn:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] [[zh:十一月廿二]] [[en:draft:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[明治]]4年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1872]][[1月2日]]） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]]を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[仁治]]3年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1242]][[12月15日]]） - [[宗尊親王]]<ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}}</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1274]]） * [[元治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1864]][[12月20日]]） - [[竹内栖鳳]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1942]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1263]][[12月24日]]） - [[北条時頼]]、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（* [[1227]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>） * [[享保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1725]][[1月6日]]） - [[近松門左衛門]]、[[浄瑠璃]]・[[歌舞伎]]狂言作家（* [[1653]]）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: translating this common phrase in them
revision.text:
[[sn:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] [[zh:十一月廿二]] [[en:draft:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[明治]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1872]][[1月2日]]） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]]を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[仁治]]3rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1242]][[12月15日]]） - [[宗尊親王]]<ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}}</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1274]]） * [[元治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1864]][[12月20日]]） - [[竹内栖鳳]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1942]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1263]][[12月24日]]） - [[北条時頼]]、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（* [[1227]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>） * [[享保]]9th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1725]][[1月6日]]） - [[近松門左衛門]]、[[浄瑠璃]]・[[歌舞伎]]狂言作家（* [[1653]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|21|11|23|10|22|12|11|1122}}

[[sn:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] [[zh:十一月廿二]] [[en:draft:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1872]][[1月2日]]） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]]を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[仁治]]3rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1242]][[12月15日]]） - [[宗尊親王]]<ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}}</ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]]6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1274]]） * [[元治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1864]][[12月20日]]） - [[竹内栖鳳]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1942]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1263]][[12月24日]]） - [[北条時頼]]、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（* [[1227]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>） * [[享保]]9th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1725]][[1月6日]]） - [[近松門左衛門]]、[[浄瑠璃]]・[[歌舞伎]]狂言作家（* [[1653]]）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[November 22 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] [[zh:十一月廿二]] [[en:draft:November 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[January 2]] ） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]] を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[Ninji]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1242]] [[December 15]] ） - [[宗尊親王]] <ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}} </ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]] 6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1274]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 20]] ） - [[竹内栖鳳]] 、[[画家]] （+ [[1942]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1263]] [[December 24]] ） - [[北条時頼]] 、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]] （* [[1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1725]] [[January 6]] ） - [[近松門左衛門]] 、[[浄瑠璃]] ・[[歌舞伎]] 狂言作家（* [[1653]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|21|11|23|10|22|12|11|1122}}

[[sn:November 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] [[zh:十一月廿二]] [[en:draft:November 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[January 2]] ） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]] を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[Ninji]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1242]] [[December 15]] ） - [[宗尊親王]] <ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}} </ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]] 6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1274]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 20]] ） - [[竹内栖鳳]] 、[[画家]] （+ [[1942]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1263]] [[December 24]] ） - [[北条時頼]] 、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]] （* [[1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1725]] [[January 6]] ） - [[近松門左衛門]] 、[[浄瑠璃]] ・[[歌舞伎]] 狂言作家（* [[1653]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[January 2]] ） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]] を3府72県に再編

== Deaths == * [[弘長]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1263]] [[December 24]] ） - [[北条時頼]] 、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]] （* [[1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1725]] [[January 6]] ） - [[近松門左衛門]] 、[[浄瑠璃]] ・[[歌舞伎]] 狂言作家（* [[1653]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[January 2]] ） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]] を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[Ninji]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1242]] [[December 15]] ） - [[宗尊親王]] <ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}} </ref>、[[鎌倉幕府]] 6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1274]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 20]] ） - [[竹内栖鳳]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1942]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1263]] [[December 24]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] 、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （* [[1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1725]] [[January 6]] ） - [[近松門左衛門]] 、[[Joruri]] ・[[歌舞伎]] 狂言作家（* [[1653]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:November 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] [[zh:十一月廿二]] [[en:draft:November 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[January 2]] ） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]] を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[Ninji]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1242]] [[December 15]] ） - [[宗尊親王]] <ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}} </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1274]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 20]] ） - [[竹内栖鳳]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1942]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1263]] [[December 24]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] 、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （* [[1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1725]] [[January 6]] ） - [[近松門左衛門]] 、[[Joruri]] ・[[歌舞伎]] 狂言作家（* [[1653]] ）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[January 2]] ） - 日本の[[都道府県|府県]] を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[Ninji]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1242]] [[December 15]] ） - [[宗尊親王]] <ref>{{Harvnb|安田|1990|p=608|loc=田村憲美「宗尊親王」}} </ref>、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 6代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1274]] ） * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[December 20]] ） - [[竹内栖鳳]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1942]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘長]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1263]] [[December 24]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] 、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （* [[1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1725]] [[January 6]] ） - [[近松門左衛門]] 、[[Joruri]] ・[[歌舞伎]] 狂言作家（* [[1653]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|21|11|23|10|22|12|11|1122}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|plain|1872|12=draft}} {{ill|January 2|ja|1月2日|12=draft}}） – 日本の{{ill|Prefectures|ja|都道府県|12=draft}} を3府72県に再編
== Births == * {{ill|Ninji|ja|宗尊親王|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1242|plain|1242|12=draft}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日|12=draft}}） – {{ill|Ninji|ja|宗尊親王|12=draft}}, a 6th‑generation {{ill|Shōgun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1274|plain|1274|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1864|plain|1864|12=draft}} {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日|12=draft}}） – {{ill|Takenouchi Seihō|ja|竹内栖鳳|12=draft}}, a {{ill|Painter|ja|画家|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1942|plain|1942|12=draft}})
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōchō|ja|弘長|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1263|plain|1263|12=draft}} {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hojo Tokiyori|ja|北条時頼|12=draft}}, the 5th {{ill|Shikken|ja|執権|12=draft}} of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1227|plain|1227|12=draft}} <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>) * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1725|plain|1725|12=draft}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}}, a writer of {{ill|Joruri|ja|浄瑠璃|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kabuki|ja|歌舞伎|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1653|plain|1653|12=draft}})
== Commemorations == * {{ill|二十日正月|ja|二十日正月|zh|二十日正月|12=draft}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|21|11|23|10|22|12|11|1122}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 22일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿二]][[zh:十一月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840493]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 22|qq=November 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]） – 日本の[[:en:Prefectures of Japan|Prefectures]] を3府72県に再編
== Births == * [[:en:Prince Munetaka|Ninji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1242|1242]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]） – [[:en:Prince Munetaka|Ninji]], a 6th‑generation [[:en:Shogun|Shōgun]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (died [[:en:1274|1274]]) * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]） – [[:en:Takeuchi Seihō|Takenouchi Seihō]], a {{ill|Painter|ja|画家|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=painter|WD=Q1028181}} (died [[:en:1942|1942]])
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōchō|Kōchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1263|1263]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1227|1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280|qq=}}</ref>) * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]], a writer of [[:en:Jōruri (music)|Joruri]] and [[:en:Kabuki|Kabuki]] (born [[:en:1653|1653]])
== Commemorations == * {{ill|二十日正月|ja|二十日正月|zh|二十日正月|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/二十日正月|qq=|1=Hatsuka Shōgatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11371391}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōchō|Kōchō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1263|1263]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the Kamakura shogunate (born [[:en:1227|1227]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280|qq=}}</ref>) * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1725|1725]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]]) – [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]], a writer of [[:en:Jōruri (music)|Joruri]] and [[:en:Kabuki|Kabuki]] (born [[:en:1653|1653]])

== Births == * [[:en:Prince Munetaka|Ninji]] 3rd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1242|1242]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]]） – [[:en:Prince Munetaka|Ninji]], a 6th‑generation [[:en:Shogun|Shōgun]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (died [[:en:1274|1274]]) * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]） – [[:en:Takeuchi Seihō|Takenouchi Seihō]], a {{ill|Painter|ja|画家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=painter|WD=Q1028181}} (died [[:en:1942|1942]])
